sections.paragraph:
Χριστιανισμός, οῦ, ὁ the way of life and belief associated w. Christ, the Christian Way, Christianity IRo 3:3; MPol 10:1. W. Ἰουδαϊσμός IMg 10:3ab; IPhld 6:1. κατὰ Χριστιανισμὸν ζῆν IMg 10:1.—DELG s.v. χρίω. DNP II 1153–64. Sv.

IRo IRo = Ignatius to the Romans—List 1

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

DNP DNP = Der Neue Pauly—List 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1090
